title: Operations Support
description: Plexicus AI ASPM are looking for a someone who doesn't just manage tasks but builds systems. As our Operations Support , you will work directly with the Director to streamline executive workflows, manage high-stakes legal documentation, and maintain our Investor Data Room. This isn't a traditional admin role. We need a startup-minded professional who treats AI as their primary teammate to automate the mundane and focus on high-value strategy. Key Responsibilities Executive Support: Manage complex calendars, travel, and high-level representation at industry forums/events. Governance & Legal: Facilitate MoUs, NDAs, and sales contracts. Maintain a "due-diligence ready" digital Data Room for investors. Financial Ops: Track sales expenses, manage business trip budgets, and lead grant/impact reporting. Strategic Research: Rapidly synthesize data to support Director-level decision-making and project reporting. Requirements: The "Startup-Fit" AI Power User: You use LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) and automation tools (Zapier, Make, or AI Agents) to 10x your output. The Architect Mindset: You don't just follow a process; you see a mess and build a digital system to fix it. High-Stakes Documentation: Experience with legal/investor documentation and "Data Room" management is a massive plus. Radical Ownership: You thrive in fast-paced environments where ambiguity is the norm. Experience Requirement: Minimum 1-2 years of executive support or similar administrative experience required. Language Requirements: Business level English proficiency required for effective communication and documentation. Spanish language skills are a plus .

title: IoT Developer for Mining Industry
description: About the role We are seeking an experienced IoT Developer to join our team at PT. SIGMA GLOBAL TEKNOLOGI (SIGMATECH) in North Kalimantan. As an IoT Developer for the Mining Industry, you will play a crucial role in designing and developing innovative IoT solutions that optimise operations and enhance productivity within the mining sector. What you'll be doing Develop and implement IoT-based systems and applications for mining operations Design and build robust, scalable, and secure IoT architectures Integrate IoT sensors, devices, and platforms with existing mining infrastructure Analyse and interpret data collected from IoT systems to generate actionable insights Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including engineers, data scientists, and subject matter experts Stay up-to-date with the latest IoT technologies, trends, and best practices Contribute to the continuous improvement and evolution of our IoT solutions What we're looking for Minimum 3 years of experience in IoT application development, preferably in the mining industry Strong proficiency in programming languages such as Python, Java, or C++ Familiarity with IoT protocols, technologies, and platforms (e.g. MQTT, LoRaWAN, AWS IoT, Azure IoT) Experience in integrating IoT systems with cloud platforms and data analytics tools Understanding of mining operations and familiarity with industry-specific challenges and requirements Excellent problem-solving and critical thinking skills Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment What we offer At PT. SIGMA GLOBAL TEKNOLOGI (SIGMATECH), we believe in fostering a dynamic and supportive work environment. You'll have the opportunity to work on cutting-edge IoT projects, collaborate with talented professionals, and contribute to the transformation of the mining industry. We offer competitive compensation, opportunities for career development, and a range of benefits to support your work-life balance. About us PT. SIGMA GLOBAL TEKNOLOGI (SIGMATECH) is a leading provider of technology solutions for the mining industry. We specialise in developing innovative IoT-based applications that drive efficiency, safety, and sustainability in mining operations. With a team of passionate and skilled professionals, we are committed to pushing the boundaries of what's possible in the mining sector. If you're ready to embark on an exciting and impactful journey, apply now to become our next IoT Developer for the Mining Industry.

title: Data Analyst Staff
description: Kesempatan PT Global Retailindo Pratama (M Mart) mencari Data Analyst Staff yang ahli dan berdedikasi untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di Denpasar, Bali. Sebagai Data Analyst Staff, Anda akan memainkan peran kunci dalam mengumpulkan, menganalisis, dan memberikan wawasan dari data bisnis kami untuk mendukung pengambilan keputusan yang lebih baik. Kandidat yang ideal memiliki keterampilan analitis yang tajam, kemampuan teknis yang kuat, dan pemahaman mendalam tentang sektor ritel. Tanggung Jawab Mengumpulkan, menganalisis, dan menginterpretasikan data dari berbagai sumber untuk mengidentifikasi tren, pola, dan wawasan yang berharga. Merancang dan mengembangkan laporan, dashboard, dan visualisasi data untuk menyampaikan temuan secara efektif kepada pemangku kepentingan. Berkoordinasi dengan tim operasional dan fungsional lainnya untuk memahami kebutuhan data dan membangun solusi yang sesuai. Persyaratan Gelar sarjana dalam bidang Ilmu Data, Statistik, Teknik Informatika, atau disiplin ilmu terkait. Fresh graduate dipersilahkan melamar, memiliki pengalaman teknis di industri ritel atau ecommerce lebih disukai Mahir dalam menggunakan alat analisis data seperti SQL, Excel, PowerBI, atau Tableau. Berpengalaman dalam mengumpulkan, memproses, dan menganalisis data kompleks dari berbagai sumber. Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik untuk menyampaikan wawasan data dengan jelas. Kemampuan bekerja dalam tim yang kolaboratif dan berorientasi pada tujuan. Tentang Kami PT Global Retailindo Pratama (M Mart) adalah pemain terkemuka dalam industri ritel modern di Indonesia. Dengan lebih dari 500 gerai di seluruh Indonesia, kami berkomitmen untuk menyediakan pengalaman berbelanja yang menyenangkan dan nyaman bagi pelanggan kami. Kami menghargai inovasi, kewirausahaan, dan kolaborasi dalam tim kami, serta menjunjung tinggi nilai-nilai integritas, keberagaman, dan kesejahteraan karyawan. Jika Anda tertarik untuk bergabung dengan tim kami yang dinamis dan berdedikasi, lamar posisi ini sekarang juga!

title: Trader / Market Analyst (Forex/Crypto)
description: Job Desc: Mengelola hubungan dengan pelanggan existing untuk meningkatkan tingkat retensi dan mengurangi churn melalui komunikasi yang proaktif dan berkelanjutan. Menangani keluhan, kendala, atau keberatan pelanggan secara efektif serta memberikan solusi yang tepat guna mencegah pelanggan berhenti menggunakan produk atau layanan. Menganalisis data perilaku pelanggan, feedback, dan laporan persentase menurunnya active rate untuk mengidentifikasi risiko serta menyusun strategi retensi yang berbasis data. Menjalankan program loyalitas, follow-up pelanggan, dan kampanye retensi (promo, upselling, cross-selling) sesuai dengan segmentasi pelanggan. Requirements: Mampu menganalisa pasar dan pergerakan grafik secara fundamental maupun teknikal. Mampu memberikan edukasi ke klien secara menyeluruh perihal materi yang berkaitan dengan pasar. Mahir berbahasa inggris dalam konteks bisnis. Mempunyai artikulasi dan kosa kata yang jelas dan lugas. Bisa berekspresi secara maksimal. Memiliki pengetahuan dalam bidang market (Forex/Crypto/Komoditas) . Benefits: Hari kerja Senin - Jumat (Sabtu – Minggu libur). Gaji pokok 4.5 – 6.5 Juta (sesuai skill dan pengalaman). Komisi diluar gaji pokok (Unlimited). Lingkungan kerja yang positif dan suportif. Bonus bulanan, triwulan dan tahunan.

You will also mentor junior and medior engineers while ensuring best practices are followed. Responsibilities Lead the development and maintenance of scalable, production-grade web scrapers. Design, build, and maintain reusable scraper libraries and frameworks. Define coding standards, workflows, and processes with the Lead Engineer. Implement robust monitoring, testing, and alerting systems to ensure reliability. Manage and optimize cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP/Azure) for large-scale scraping workloads. Optimize compute, storage, and proxy usage for performance and cost efficiency. Mentor and review code of junior and medior engineers. Collaborate with stakeholders to prioritize backlog items and integrate scraper outputs into pipelines. Act as second in command to the Lead Data Engineer for technical and project support. Requirements Must-Have Skills: Strong proficiency in Python and SQL , with hands-on web scraping experience. Deep knowledge of frameworks like Scrapy, Playwright, Selenium , and anti-bot strategies. Experience designing reusable libraries, coding standards, and modular scraper frameworks. Proficiency with cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP/Azure), including compute, storage, and security basics. Nice-to-Have Skills: Workflow orchestration (Airflow, Prefect, Dagster). Observability/monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana, CloudWatch, ELK). Cost optimization in cloud and proxy-heavy workloads. Knowledge of data governance, RBAC, and compliance. Exposure to downstream data engineering pipelines (ETL/ELT, APIs, databases). Why You’ll Love Working Here Be part of a data-driven company that values curiosity, precision, and impact. Collaborate with talented data engineers and analysts to solve real business challenges. title: Data Modeler
description: Role Description: Data Modeler  play a key role in designing and implementing data models that support Omantel’s data-driven initiatives. As a Data Modeler, you will work closely with our data architects, data analysts, and business stakeholders to understand their data requirements and translate them into logical and physical data models. You will also be responsible for ensuring the accuracy, completeness, and consistency of our data models, as well as maintaining their documentation and metadata. Your expertise in data modeling tools and techniques, as well as your ability to communicate complex data concepts to non-technical stakeholders, will be critical to the success of our data-driven projects. Responsibilities ·         Develop and maintain complex data models for business data analysis and reporting purposes. ·         Collaborate with stakeholders and cross-functional teams to understand data requirements and design appropriate data models that align with business needs. ·         Evaluate and recommend data modeling tools and technologies to improve efficiency and accuracy of data modeling processes. ·         Create and maintain data dictionaries and metadata repositories to ensure consistency and integrity of data models. ·         Identify and resolve data model performance issues to optimize database performance and enhance overall system functionality. ·         Document and communicate data model designs and standards to ensure understanding and compliance across the organization. ·         Stay current with industry best practices and trends in data modeling and incorporate new techniques and methodologies into our data modeling processes. Required Skills & Experience Strong understanding of SQL and data modeling concepts Proficiency in data modeling tools such as PowerDesigner Experience in designing and implementing database structures Ability to create and maintain conceptual, logical, and physical data models Familiarity with data warehousing and ETL processes Knowledge of industry best practices for data modeling and database design Ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams to gather and analyze data requirements- Experience in performance tuning and optimization of database queries Strong analytical and problem-solving skills Excellent communication and documentation skills. Able to interact effectively both internally and externally. A self-starter

title: Database Engineer (Telco)
description: Role Overview The Mid-Senior Database Engineer (Telecom Domain) will lead the design, optimization, and governance of large-scale telecom databases across OSS/BSS, network analytics, and customer data platforms. This role requires deep telecom domain expertise, advanced SQL engineering, and hands-on experience with cloud-based data ecosystems. Key Responsibilities - Architect and optimize high-volume telecom databases (e.g., BigQuery, PostgreSQL, Oracle). - Lead TM Forum SID–aligned data modeling, metadata lineage creation, and governance. - Design scalable schemas for CDRs, subscriber data, network KPIs, billing, CRM and product catalog. - Drive performance tuning, query optimization, and data reliability engineering. - Implement high-availability, DR, RTO/RPO strategies for mission-critical telecom workloads. - Mentor junior engineers and support cross-functional Architecture/SME teams. - Oversee integration of DB layers with OSS/BSS, Data Lake, mediation, and analytics systems. - Ensure data security, access governance, and telecom compliance controls. - Lead root-cause analysis for performance degradation and production incidents. Required Skills & Experience - 5–9 years of experience in Database Engineering, with at least 3 years in telecom. - Strong SQL mastery, data modeling, and optimization skills. - Expertise in BigQuery, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle or equivalent. - Deep understanding of OSS/BSS, telecom data domains, TM Forum SID. - Experience designing schemas for telecom datasets (CDRs, charging, billing, network KPIs). - Hands-on cloud experience (GCP preferred). - Knowledge of metadata/lineage tools (Erwin, Collibra). - Strong troubleshooting, analytical reasoning, and stakeholder communication. - Ability to lead design sessions and guide junior team members. Qualifications - Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, IT, Telecom, or related field. - Relevant cloud certification (GCP/AWS/Azure) preferred. - Telecom industry project experience is mandatory.

onboarding/offboarding access for engineering teams GitHub / GitLab Administration Manage repository access and team permissions Configure branch protection and security policies Maintain secrets and access controls Support secure development workflows Security & Compliance Operations Monitor device and access compliance Perform periodic access reviews Support internal security best practices technologies Opportunity to build security and platform governance from the ground up Fast-growth environment with real ownership

description: Hikari Indo Sarana mencari seorang Data & System Integration Specialist yang akan menjadi arsitek digital perusahaan. Posisi ini tidak menangani infrastruktur fisik (hardware/jaringan), melainkan berfokus pada integritas data, otomatisasi sistem, dan implementasi teknologi AI guna mendukung pengambilan keputusan strategis. Tugas dan Tanggung Jawab Utama Melakukan proses data cleansing secara menyeluruh (mengubah dirty data menjadi clean data) untuk memastikan validitas informasi di seluruh sistem Hikari. Mengembangkan dasbor Data Visualization yang dinamis untuk menyajikan performa operasional dan finansial secara visual kepada manajemen. Membangun skrip atau aplikasi sederhana menggunakan Python untuk mengotomatisasi tugas-tugas rutin antar departemen. Menjadi jembatan teknis dalam pengaplikasian teknologi AI di sistem Hikari, berkoordinasi langsung dengan vendor eksternal untuk memastikan integrasi berjalan mulus. Mengelola administrasi domain, hosting, dan operasional cloud (Google Workspace/Microsoft 365). Mengelola aspek teknis dan front-end website perusahaan agar tetap relevan dan fungsional. Menjamin keamanan data perusahaan melalui manajemen SSL, enkripsi dasar, dan protokol keamanan perangkat lunak. Mengelola dan memantau prosedur backup data secara otomatis dan berkala untuk menjamin pemulihan data jika terjadi kendala (disaster recovery). Syarat dan Kualifikasi Wajib lulusan S1 Computer Science (Ilmu Komputer) atau Informatika. Penguasaan mendalam bahasa pemrograman Python untuk pengolahan data. Pengalaman dalam Data Cleansing dan manajemen database relasional. Kemampuan membuat visualisasi data yang tajam (Power BI, Tableau, atau library Python). Memahami konsep Integration & AI (bagaimana menghubungkan API atau layanan pihak ketiga ke sistem internal). Paham manajemen hosting, domain, dan layanan cloud. Problem Solver yang kreatif dan proaktif. Memiliki kemampuan analisis yang kuat terhadap data. Mampu berkomunikasi secara efektif untuk menerjemahkan kebutuhan bisnis ke bahasa teknis vendor.

title: Data Engineer
description: The Data Transformation Functional is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable data pipelines and transformation processes that enable reliable data flow across systems. This role bridges business needs and technical implementation by translating functional data requirements into optimized data models and ETL/ELT workflows. The engineer ensures data is properly cleansed, structured, and enriched for analytical and operational use—supporting reporting, business intelligence (BI), data science, and digital initiatives. The position requires strong skills in data modeling, SQL, and cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP), with an understanding of data governance, quality, and performance optimization. Job Description: Design, develop, and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines for data ingestion, transformation, and integration. Collaborate with business and analytics teams to define data requirements and translate them into technical solutions. Build and optimize data models to support BI tools, dashboards, and advanced analytics. Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and compliance with data governance policies. Automate data workflows and monitor pipeline performance for reliability and scalability. Work closely with data architects and functional teams to improve overall data ecosystem efficiency. Job Requirement: Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, or a related field; Master’s degree is a plus. Experience in data engineering, data transformation, or data integration roles is a plus. Fresh Grad is welcome. Proven experience designing, developing, and maintaining ETL/ELT data pipelines for structured and semi-structured data using tools such as dbt, Informatica, Talend, or Apache Airflow. Hands-on experience working with cloud-based data platforms such as Snowflake, Databricks, Google BigQuery, Amazon Redshift, or Azure Synapse. Strong proficiency in SQL and practical experience with at least one programming language (e.g., Python, Scala, or Java) for automation and data manipulation. Demonstrated experience integrating and preparing data for Business Intelligence (BI) tools, such as Power BI, Qlik Sense, or Tableau, ensuring optimized data structures for visualization and analysis. Experience collaborating closely with business analysts, functional teams, and data consumers to translate business requirements into technical data solutions. Exposure to version control systems (Git) and CI/CD workflows, ideally within an Agile development environment. Technical skills: SQL, Python, or Scala. TL/ELT tools (e.g., dbt, Informatica, Talend). Cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift). CI/CD and version control (e.g., Git, Jenkins) Soft skills: Analytical Thinking Ability to interpret complex data processes, identify root causes of issues, and propose practical solutions. Business Acumen Understands business processes and can translate functional requirements into technical data solutions that add measurable value. Communication Skills Able to communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders, including data architects, analysts, and business users. Collaboration & Teamwork Works effectively within cross-functional teams, fostering cooperation between IT, data, and business units. Problem-Solving Mindset Approaches challenges systematically, balancing technical precision with business needs. Attention to Detail Ensures data accuracy and consistency throughout transformation and integration processes. Continuous Learning Stays updated with emerging data technologies, engineering frameworks, and best practices.

description: KUALIFIKASI: Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang Ilmu Komputer, Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, atau bidang terkait. DESKRIPSI PEKERJAAN: •        Mengumpulkan, mengelola, dan memelihara data perusahaan serta memastikan kualitas data melalui validasi, pembersihan, dan pengaturan agar tetap konsisten. •        Mengelola, memonitor, dan memelihara sistem database perusahaan serta melakukan backup, pemulihan, dan optimalisasi kinerja database secara berkala. •        Melindungi data dari akses yang tidak sah dengan menerapkan prosedur keamanan dan kontrol akses. •        Membuat dan memodifikasi struktur database sesuai kebutuhan perusahaan. •        Menentukan hak akses pengguna berdasarkan peran dan tanggung jawab serta menangani permintaan akses data sesuai pedoman. •        Memantau performa database dan memastikan ketersediaan data secara optimal. •        Membuat laporan berkala tentang penggunaan data dan status database untuk manajemen, serta mendukung analisis data dengan menyediakan data yang relevan dan akurat. •        Membuat dan memelihara dokumentasi konfigurasi, struktur, dan prosedur pengelolaan database serta mendokumentasikan semua perubahan.

title: AI Engineer
description: Company Description Kata.ai is an Indonesian Conversational Artificial Intelligence company with a focus on creating technology to enhance the understanding of human conversations, improving the way humans collaborate with machines. Kata.ai’s Natural Language Processing (NLP) technology powers MultiPurpose chatbots (virtual customer service / virtual friend) for major corporations in Indonesia across different kinds of industries such as Unilever (FMCG), Telkomsel (Telco), Bank BRI (Financial Services), and Alfamart (Retail). The company’s proprietary Kata Bot Platform can be leveraged to create feature-rich chatbots on top of Kata.ai’s robust and scalable AI technology platform, ensuring company of any size can easily build their own chatbot on any messaging platform. With this platform, it is now possible for the business to focus on designing engaging interaction for their customers, while Kata.ai handles all the technology aspects of the chatbots. Established in 2015, the company has become a trusted partner for major corporations such as Microsoft, Accenture, and Line. In 2020, the company received Series-B funding from TransPacific Technology Fund and MDI Venture. Job Description You will design, build, and deploy production-grade AI systems — including LLM-powered conversational agents, RAG pipelines, NLP workflows, and voice AI integrations — to deliver intelligent, reliable, and measurable AI solutions for enterprise clients across government, financial services, healthcare, and telecommunications sectors — so that Kata's clients can automate customer interactions at scale with high accuracy, low latency, and strong business impact. Qualifications Qualifications & Education : Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Computational Linguistics, or related field Master's degree in AI/ML is a plus Relevant certifications (GCP AI/ML, DeepLearning.AI, etc.) are advantageous Technical Skills : LLM Integration: OpenAI GPT-4o, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, or open-source models (LLaMA, Mistral, Qwen) AI Frameworks: LangChain, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, or similar agent/RAG orchestration frameworks Prompt Engineering: System prompt design, few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought, structured output (JSON mode, function calling) RAG Pipelines: Document chunking, embedding strategies, retrieval optimization, reranking Vector Databases: Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, or pgvector Voice AI: LiveKit Agents SDK, STT integrations (Deepgram, Google Speech-to-Text, Whisper), TTS integrations (ElevenLabs, Google TTS) Languages: Python (required); FastAPI for AI service exposure Cloud: GCP or Azure for AI/ML workload deployment — Vertex AI, Azure OpenAI, Cloud Run Evaluation Frameworks: RAGAS, DeepEval, custom eval pipelines, or LLM-as-judge approaches Containerization: Docker; basic Kubernetes for deploying AI services Monitoring: AI-specific observability — LangSmith, Langfuse, or custom logging for tracing LLM calls in production Additional Information Skills & Competencies : Strong analytical thinking — able to diagnose and improve AI system behavior through systematic evaluation and iteration Ability to balance research-oriented experimentation with production-grade engineering rigor Good communication skills — able to explain AI system behavior, limitations, and tradeoffs clearly to non-technical Product and Project stakeholders Quality-first mindset — proactively defines success metrics and failure modes before building Collaborative and cross-functional — works closely with Backend, Frontend, and QA to ensure AI components integrate cleanly into the full product Agile/Scrum mindset with comfort operating in sprint-based delivery cycles Keeps up with the fast-moving AI landscape and proactively identifies relevant new tools, models, or techniques applicable to the team

title: Security Engineer
description: PT Teknologi Inovasi Labs (TILabs) is a software and analytics company based in Jakarta, focused on developing ERP systems, SaaS products, and analytics solutions powered by big data and machine learning. We are committed to technological innovation and to building solutions that are secure, scalable, and reliable to meet a wide range of business needs. Role Description : This is a full-time, on-site Security Engineer position at PT Teknologi Inovasi Labs (TILabs). The Security Engineer is responsible for executing both offensive and defensive security strategies to ensure the resilience of our ERP systems, SaaS products, and company infrastructure through controlled attack testing, vulnerability identification, and continuous strengthening of detection and protection controls. Key responsibilities include conducting penetration testing on web applications and APIs, identifying and validating vulnerabilities based on OWASP standards, classifying weaknesses using CWE, referencing relevant CVEs, configuring SIEM/XDR, performing threat hunting, and collaborating with the DevOps team to ensure mitigations are effective and continuously maintained across production environments and the SaaS platform. Qualifications : Experience in web application and API penetration testing Understanding of PTES, OWASP Top 10, CWE, and CVE Experience using Burp Suite, Nuclei, Osmedeus, or similar offensive security tools Experience with SIEM/XDR tools such as Wazuh and IDS/IPS solutions such as Suricata Strong understanding of Linux and networking fundamentals (HTTP, TLS, DNS) Ability to produce clear, well-documented Proofs of Concept (PoCs) Scripting skills in Python or Bash are preferred Experience in bug bounty, vulnerability disclosure, or capture-the-flag (CTF) is a plus Certifications such as OSCP/CEH or equivalent are a strong plus Minimum 1–2 years of experience as a Security Engineer; fresh graduates are welcome to apply Additional Requirements : Minimum 1+ year of experience in Red Team / Offensive Security Submit your recent CV/Portfolio to recruitment@tilabs.id

title: Senior Business Analyst
description: Description FINNS Beach Club is looking for a strategic Business Analytics & Performance Optimization Lead to drive measurable improvements in revenue generation, cost efficiency, and operational excellence across our hospitality operations. This position's mission is toransform raw data into profit. Your success will be measured by the tangible business improvements you drive: revenue lifted, costs reduced, and operations streamlined. You'll own the analytics function, uncover hidden opportunities in our data, and work directly with leadership to implement changes that impact the bottom line. Summary FINNS World's Best Beach Club is not just a beach club; it's a destination where dreams come alive! We pride ourselves on creating exhilarating entertainment, vibrant energy, and unforgettable F&B experiences. Nestled along the breathtaking Bali coastline, we provide a one-of-a-kind party atmosphere that leaves our guests craving for more. Responsibilities Revenue Optimization Analyze pricing strategies, demand patterns, and customer behavior to identify revenue uplift opportunities Build dynamic pricing models and yield management frameworks to maximize RevPAG/revenue per available guest Identify underperforming revenue streams and recommend strategic interventions Quantify the impact of promotional activities, packages, and marketing initiatives Cost & Margin Management Conduct deep-dive cost analysis across labor, COGS, utilities, and overhead to identify efficiency gains Build financial models that scenario-test cost reduction initiatives before implementation Establish benchmark metrics and alert systems for margin compression Partner with procurement and operations to optimize inventory levels and reduce waste Operational Excellence Design and maintain KPI dashboards that give real-time visibility into operational health Identify bottlenecks in guest flow, service delivery, and resource allocation Model staffing optimization scenarios to balance service quality with labor efficiency Create predictive models for demand forecasting to improve planning accuracy Analytics Infrastructure & Insights Own the ERP Analytics environment: build robust reporting architecture that scales Develop SQL-based data pipelines to automate analysis and eliminate manual reporting Establish data governance standards and drive improvement in data quality across teams Translate complex analytical findings into clear, actionable recommendations with quantified business impact Strategic Partnership Present monthly performance reviews to leadership with specific recommendations and ROI projections Challenge and course-correct when operational teams are working with poor data or flawed assumptions Act as the analytical backbone for strategic initiatives. Qualifications 5+ years of progressive experience in Business Intelligence, FP&A, or Operational Analytics with demonstrated impact on business performance Hospitality industry experience required, such as Beach Clubs, Hotels, Multi-unit F&B Groups, or similar high-volume, margin-sensitive operations Proven ability to architect reporting solutions, not just run reports Can write complex queries for analysis, automation, and data quality validation Advanced SQL proficiency. Expert-level skills in scenario modeling, sensitivity analysis, and P&L forecasting Must provide specific examples of analyses that led to measurable business improvements (revenue growth, cost savings, efficiency gains) Fluent Bahasa Indonesia and Professional English are mandatory Experience with additional BI/analytics tools (Tableau, Power BI, etc ) (preferable) Experience in Python and R (preferable) Background in revenue management or yield optimization (preferable) Exposure to ERP implementation or system integration projects (preferable) Consulting or multi-site operations experience (preferable)

title: Data Engineer
description: The Data Transformation Functional is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable data pipelines and transformation processes that enable reliable data flow across systems. This role bridges business needs and technical implementation by translating functional data requirements into optimized data models and ETL/ELT workflows. The engineer ensures data is properly cleansed, structured, and enriched for analytical and operational use—supporting reporting, business intelligence (BI), data science, and digital initiatives. The position requires strong skills in data modeling, SQL, and cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP), with an understanding of data governance, quality, and performance optimization. Job Description: Design, develop, and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines for data ingestion, transformation, and integration. Collaborate with business and analytics teams to define data requirements and translate them into technical solutions. Build and optimize data models to support BI tools, dashboards, and advanced analytics. Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and compliance with data governance policies. Automate data workflows and monitor pipeline performance for reliability and scalability. Work closely with data architects and functional teams to improve overall data ecosystem efficiency. Job Requirement: Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, or a related field; Master’s degree is a plus. Experience in data engineering, data transformation, or data integration roles is a plus. Fresh Grad is welcome. Proven experience designing, developing, and maintaining ETL/ELT data pipelines for structured and semi-structured data using tools such as dbt, Informatica, Talend, or Apache Airflow. Hands-on experience working with cloud-based data platforms such as Snowflake, Databricks, Google BigQuery, Amazon Redshift, or Azure Synapse. Strong proficiency in SQL and practical experience with at least one programming language (e.g., Python, Scala, or Java) for automation and data manipulation. Demonstrated experience integrating and preparing data for Business Intelligence (BI) tools, such as Power BI, Qlik Sense, or Tableau, ensuring optimized data structures for visualization and analysis. Experience collaborating closely with business analysts, functional teams, and data consumers to translate business requirements into technical data solutions. Exposure to version control systems (Git) and CI/CD workflows, ideally within an Agile development environment. Technical skills: SQL, Python, or Scala. TL/ELT tools (e.g., dbt, Informatica, Talend). Cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift). CI/CD and version control (e.g., Git, Jenkins) Soft skills: Analytical Thinking Ability to interpret complex data processes, identify root causes of issues, and propose practical solutions. Business Acumen Understands business processes and can translate functional requirements into technical data solutions that add measurable value. Communication Skills Able to communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders, including data architects, analysts, and business users. Collaboration & Teamwork Works effectively within cross-functional teams, fostering cooperation between IT, data, and business units. Problem-Solving Mindset Approaches challenges systematically, balancing technical precision with business needs. Attention to Detail Ensures data accuracy and consistency throughout transformation and integration processes. Continuous Learning Stays updated with emerging data technologies, engineering frameworks, and best practices.

title: Quality Engineer (Tobacco/ FMCG Background)
description: POSITION INTRODUCTORY You shall report directly to Manager, Quality. The Engineer, Quality is responsible for overseeing the quality assurance of incoming materials, managing project trials and improving supplier quality performance. This role involves conducting inspections, audits, and tests, documenting quality data, implementing quality control measures, and supporting continuous improvement initiatives. The Engineer, Quality works closely with cross-functional teams to maintain product quality, identify process improvements, and drive compliance with quality management systems. RESPONSIBLITIES: 1.      Quality Assurance: Execute quality assurance activities to ensure compliance with quality standards, regulations, and specifications. Perform inspections, audits, and checks at various stages of the production process. Verify adherence to approved procedures, work instructions, and quality control plans. 2. Quality Control: Conduct tests, measurements, and evaluations on raw materials, components, and finished products. Utilize appropriate tools and equipment to perform accurate quality control assessments. Document and communicate test results, deviations, and non-conformances. 3. Documentation and Record Keeping: Maintain accurate and up-to-date quality control records, including test reports, inspection findings, and quality data. Assist in the preparation and maintenance of quality documentation, such as standard operating procedures (SOPs) and work instructions. Organize and archive quality records in compliance with regulatory requirements. 4. Non-Conformance Management: Identify and report non-conformances, deviations, and quality issues. Participate in investigations to determine root causes and contribute to corrective and preventive action (CAPA) plans. Assist in the implementation and tracking of CAPA activities. 5.      Supplier Quality Management: Participate in supplier evaluation and qualification processes. Collaborate with procurement and supplier management teams to ensure supplier quality requirements are met. Conduct supplier audits and assessments as required. Issue NCM for material non-confirmation and follow-up on supplier’s CAPA until closure of NCM 6.      Communication and Collaboration: Communicate quality-related information and updates to relevant stakeholders. Collaborate with production, engineering, and other departments to address quality concerns and drive improvements. Provide support and guidance to production teams regarding quality control procedures and requirements. 7.      Continuous Improvement: Identify opportunities for process improvements and participate in quality improvement initiatives. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement corrective actions and preventive measures. Support the development and implementation of quality-related training programs. 8.      Project Trial Management: Work closely with respective stakeholders on the project trial and ensuring the objectives are met. Preparing and executing Quality Plan for each project trial. Plan and manage the quality aspect in term of compiling quality data, lab data and sensory. Update the relevant stakeholders and HQ on the progress of the trials and submission of reports on a timely manner as per project timeline. REQUIREMENTS: ·        Associate/bachelor’s degree in chemistry/mechanical/quality, Industrial Engineering, or a related field. ·        1 year Experience in Quality roles within a manufacturing environment, preferably from tobacco or FMCG industry. ·        Strong analytical skills and proficiency in MS Office suites ·        Able to work under tight project timeline and priorities jobs well ·        Excellent communication and collaboration skills. ·        Detail-oriented with strong problem-solving and data analysis capabilities. ·        Attention to detail, problem-solving skills, and the ability to collaborate across departments. ·        Ability to manage cross-functional teams and work closely with HQ on project trials and any ad hoc request.

title: Senior NET Full Stack Engineer
description: About the role Join our growing team at PT Artha Solutions Indonesia as a Senior .NET Full Stack Developer. In this key role, you will be responsible for designing, developing and maintaining high-performance web applications using the latest .NET technologies. As a senior member of the development team, you will play a pivotal part in shaping the technical direction of our products and mentoring more junior developers. This is a full-time position based in our modern office in Jakarta. What you'll be doing Design and implement scalable, maintainable, and secure cloud solutions using Microsoft Azure. Oversee the deployment, management, and operation of applications on Azure, ensuring optimal performance. Collaborate with IT and development teams to plan and execute cloud strategies, providing guidance on Azure best practices. Develop front-end applications, database development, and middle-tier services. Implement DevOps practices, including continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipelines. Ensure cloud solutions integrate seamlessly with existing systems and meet business requirements. Monitor and optimize cloud solutions for performance efficiency. Work with architects and other developers on the technical design of cloud and digital platforms, including hands-on full-stack development. What we're looking for 8+ years of experience in developing enterprise-level web applications using .NET technologies Proficient in C#, .NET Core, ASP.NET MVC, and modern web frameworks such as Angular or React Strong understanding of relational databases (SQL Server) and NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Cosmos DB) Hands-on experience in designing and consuming RESTful APIs Familiarity with DevOps practices, including CI/CD pipelines and cloud-based hosting platforms Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills with a sharp attention to detail Strong communication and collaboration skills to work effectively with cross-functional teams Ability to mentor and guide more junior developers in the team Must Have & Desired Skills: • In-depth knowledge of cloud computing concepts and Microsoft Azure services. • Proficiency in scripting and programming languages such as PowerShell, Python, and C#. • Experience with Azure-specific services like Azure SQL Database, Azure DevOps, and Azure Active Directory, Azure Data Factory, Key Vault, Function Apps, App Services, API Management. • Strong understanding of DevOps principles and tools. • Knowledge of security best practices and compliance standards for cloud environments. • Excellent problem-solving and troubleshooting skills. • Strong collaboration and communication skills, with the ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams. • Continuous learning and skill upgradation to keep up with the dynamic nature of cloud technologies. Desired Skills : • Experience with front-end technologies and frameworks like Angular. • Familiarity with agile and DevOps practices. • Previous experience in a similar role within a fast-paced environment. Education: Bachelor's degree in technology or equivalent.

title: Supply Chain Modelling & Optimization Consultant
description: A great opportunity to join and shape a new entrepreneurial team focused on providing data-driven solutions and advisory to our clients. Haskoning is a highly respected 140+ year old engineering consultancy company that designs & builds industrial assets such factories and logistics centers for many leading organizations. In 2022, we've joined forces with Districon, a leading supply chain analytics and logistics consultancy with 45 years' experience developing strategies and solving issues for supply chain management and integrated logistics. Our new joint team forms the Supply Chain & Logistics Centre of Excellence within Haskoning. We provide top-tier logistics & supply chain advisory as well as digital supply chain advanced analytics services on top of Haskoning's traditional engineering and consultancy domain knowledge. Supply chain is our DNA, engineering and analytics our key focus and interest. We believe that applying the right technology enables our clients to improve their supply chain processes and planning. And, as a consequence, improve their business: better results, build resilience and be sustainable. What will you do What is strategically the optimal supply network? What is tactically the optimal balance between demand, supply and capacity? What is the optimal order batching and picking sequence in a warehouse? What is the optimal production schedule in manufacturing environment? What is the optimal fleet utilization of an ocean, air, rail, or road carrier? And any other supply chain optimization challenge. As a Supply Chain & Optimization Consultant you solve these challenges by modelling optimization & simulation applications for our clients, that enable them to make data driven, scenario base, decisions. You apply your operations research skills and work together with the team to collect and validate the data, to connect the application with the core systems, to design a user interface, to train and support users. You participate in or lead the developments, testing and implementation of new applications, guide the project team and the client's team. You participate in or lead the support and maintenance of the applications: updating applications, identifying and solving bugs, and continuously improving applications by developing new functionalities. You participate in or lead regular sprint meetings, connecting the business challenges with the solution requirements. Next to the project work, you will also get responsibilities in business development. Think about setting up and giving demos, preparing material for conferences, and talking to potential clients. As we work project-based it is important for us to get new clients and keep on generating work. We work a lot with the mathematical optimization platform AIMMS, simulation software WITNESS Horizon, and SQL, Python, and PowerBI. Where you will work This role is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. Candidates are required to have valid work permits for the place of work (no sponsorship). The role offers flexibility to work partly at home and partly in the office. Travel to client sites across APAC for project work is occasionally required. What you bring A strong interest for complex puzzles in the supply chain domain. You have an affinity with programming and connecting data sets. You are critical, accurate and show courage, you like to create your own opportunities. Furthermore, as Supply Chain Modeling & Optimization Consultant you are: Analytically strong: capable of understanding and explaining complex processes. Good at mathematics: you can easily draw the right conclusions from a large amount of data. Pragmatic: you apply a creative approach, and, not always the most complex mathematical solution will help our client. Technology driven: you have an interest in collecting, optimizing, connecting and structuring data from multiple sources. A bit headstrong: you think further than necessary and also give unsolicited advice. As a basis, you bring along: A completed academic master's degree in Operations Research, (Applied) Mathematics, Industrial Engineering or a related study. Some work experience or interest in supply chain, logistics or ICT, gained during or after your studies. (Demonstrated) experience or interest in mathematical optimization software programs, simulation software (Witness), SQL, Python, R, PowerBI or Qlik. Experience with AIMMS is nice to have, as most of our application we support have been developed using AIMMS software. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. Fluent in English - excellent written and verbal communication skills. Can work independently on projects, but is as well a powerful team player who wants to work on a wide variety of projects. Willingness to travel, both for incidental trips to our offices in Singapore and The Netherlands, or to APAC clients. We welcome both starters as consultants with 0-3 years of relevant working experience. What we offer you At Haskoning we offer a great working atmosphere in which organizational and personal development take central stage. Our assessment and rewarding process will always be based on your personal competences. We offer you a wide range of projects in which you can participate and gain experience. You will learn from working with experienced consultants and get a glimpse of the various areas of expertise we have on offer. Learn and experience in order to map out your own career path. Furthermore, we offer: Open and respectful environment A great work-life balance and flexible hours Flexibility to work partly at home and partly in the office Variety of exciting and challenging projects with a diverse range of clients Participation in the multi-year development program that consists of coaching and training of practical skills and your consulting skills Vacation days for time off A competitive primary salary Are you our new colleague? If this role sounds like the right challenge, we are interested in hearing from you! We will share more about us and the benefits of coming to work together in our small but quickly growing team and the wider Haskoning & Districon cultures and work benefits during our interview process. Please apply with your CV and feel free to connect directly with our team directly on LinkedIn for any questions.

(Out of 4.00). • Minimum 3 year(s) of working in the Data Center Operation Space • Strong knowledge of structured cabling and patching systems. • Hands on experience in hardware support (server and storage systems, break fix activities, troubleshooting and diagnostic) • Experience in hardware support (server & storage), including break-fix and troubleshooting. • Able to handle incidents, provide timely updates, and perform escalation when required. • Familiar with rack, space, power, and cooling allocation as well as capacity management. • Understanding of Incident & Change Management processes. • Experience in large-scale / mission-critical environments is an advantage. • Familiar with server and storage products from Dell Technologies, IBM, and Hewlett Packard Enterprise. • Relevant certifications (CDCP, ITIL, Server+, Linux+, Network+, A+, CCNA) are a plus. • Work on a team or individual basis and are ready to work under pressure. • Fluent in English, both written and verbal communication. • Good communication skills with all levels. • Willing to be on duty and do official trips out of town. • Mature, honest, energetic, confident, hard work and creative. • Responsible, thorough, and disciplined. • Having high COMMITMENT and INTEGRITY of work. • Physically and mentally healthy. • Placement in Jakarta. • Able to work as soon as possible.

title: Data Modeler
description: Role Description: Data Modeler  play a key role in designing and implementing data models that support Omantel’s data-driven initiatives. You will also be responsible for ensuring the accuracy, completeness, and consistency of our data models, as well as maintaining their documentation and metadata. Your expertise in data modeling tools and techniques, as well as your ability to communicate complex data concepts to non-technical stakeholders, will be critical to the success of our data-driven projects. Responsibilities ·         Develop and maintain complex data models for business data analysis and reporting purposes. ·         Collaborate with stakeholders and cross-functional teams to understand data requirements and design appropriate data models that align with business needs. ·         Evaluate and recommend data modeling tools and technologies to improve efficiency and accuracy of data modeling processes. ·         Create and maintain data dictionaries and metadata repositories to ensure consistency and integrity of data models. ·         Identify and resolve data model performance issues to optimize database performance and enhance overall system functionality. ·         Document and communicate data model designs and standards to ensure understanding and compliance across the organization. ·         Stay current with industry best practices and trends in data modeling and incorporate new techniques and methodologies into our data modeling processes. Required Skills & Experience Strong understanding of SQL and data modeling concepts Proficiency in data modeling tools such as PowerDesigner Experience in designing and implementing database structures Ability to create and maintain conceptual, logical, and physical data models Familiarity with data warehousing and ETL processes Knowledge of industry best practices for data modeling and database design Ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams to gather and analyze data requirements- Experience in performance tuning and optimization of database queries Strong analytical and problem-solving skills Excellent communication and documentation skills. Able to interact effectively both internally and externally. A self-starter

The engineer ensures data is properly cleansed, structured, and enriched for analytical and operational use—supporting reporting, business intelligence (BI), data science, and digital initiatives. The position requires strong skills in data modeling, SQL, and cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP), with an understanding of data governance, quality, and performance optimization. Job Description: Design, develop, and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines for data ingestion, transformation, and integration. Collaborate with business and analytics teams to define data requirements and translate them into technical solutions. Automate data workflows and monitor pipeline performance for reliability and scalability. Work closely with data architects and functional teams to improve overall data ecosystem efficiency. Job Requirement: Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, or a related field; Master’s degree is a plus. Experience in data engineering, data transformation, or data integration roles is a plus. Fresh Grad is welcome. Proven experience designing, developing, and maintaining ETL/ELT data pipelines for structured and semi-structured data using tools such as dbt, Informatica, Talend, or Apache Airflow. Hands-on experience working with cloud-based data platforms such as Snowflake, Databricks, Google BigQuery, Amazon Redshift, or Azure Synapse. Strong proficiency in SQL and practical experience with at least one programming language (e.g., Python, Scala, or Java) for automation and data manipulation. Demonstrated experience integrating and preparing data for Business Intelligence (BI) tools, such as Power BI, Qlik Sense, or Tableau, ensuring optimized data structures for visualization and analysis. Experience collaborating closely with business analysts, functional teams, and data consumers to translate business requirements into technical data solutions. Exposure to version control systems (Git) and CI/CD workflows, ideally within an Agile development environment. Technical skills: SQL, Python, or Scala. TL/ELT tools (e.g., dbt, Informatica, Talend). Cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift). CI/CD and version control (e.g., Git, Jenkins) Soft skills: Analytical Thinking Ability to interpret complex data processes, identify root causes of issues, and propose practical solutions. Business Acumen Understands business processes and can translate functional requirements into technical data solutions that add measurable value. Communication Skills Able to communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders, including data architects, analysts, and business users. Collaboration & Teamwork Works effectively within cross-functional teams, fostering cooperation between IT, data, and business units. Problem-Solving Mindset Approaches challenges systematically, balancing technical precision with business needs. Attention to Detail Ensures data accuracy and consistency throughout transformation and integration processes. Continuous Learning Stays updated with emerging data technologies, engineering frameworks, and best practices.

title: AI Engineer
description: Company Description Kata.ai is an Indonesian Conversational Artificial Intelligence company with a focus on creating technology to enhance the understanding of human conversations, improving the way humans collaborate with machines. Kata.ai’s Natural Language Processing (NLP) technology powers MultiPurpose chatbots (virtual customer service / virtual friend) for major corporations in Indonesia across different kinds of industries such as Unilever (FMCG), Telkomsel (Telco), Bank BRI (Financial Services), and Alfamart (Retail). The company’s proprietary Kata Bot Platform can be leveraged to create feature-rich chatbots on top of Kata.ai’s robust and scalable AI technology platform, ensuring company of any size can easily build their own chatbot on any messaging platform. With this platform, it is now possible for the business to focus on designing engaging interaction for their customers, while Kata.ai handles all the technology aspects of the chatbots. Established in 2015, the company has become a trusted partner for major corporations such as Microsoft, Accenture, and Line. In 2020, the company received Series-B funding from TransPacific Technology Fund and MDI Venture. Job Description You will design, build, and deploy production-grade AI systems — including LLM-powered conversational agents, RAG pipelines, NLP workflows, and voice AI integrations — to deliver intelligent, reliable, and measurable AI solutions for enterprise clients across government, financial services, healthcare, and telecommunications sectors — so that Kata's clients can automate customer interactions at scale with high accuracy, low latency, and strong business impact. Qualifications Qualifications & Education : Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Computational Linguistics, or related field Master's degree in AI/ML is a plus Relevant certifications (GCP AI/ML, DeepLearning.AI, etc.) are advantageous Technical Skills : LLM Integration: OpenAI GPT-4o, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, or open-source models (LLaMA, Mistral, Qwen) AI Frameworks: LangChain, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, or similar agent/RAG orchestration frameworks Prompt Engineering: System prompt design, few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought, structured output (JSON mode, function calling) RAG Pipelines: Document chunking, embedding strategies, retrieval optimization, reranking Vector Databases: Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, or pgvector Voice AI: LiveKit Agents SDK, STT integrations (Deepgram, Google Speech-to-Text, Whisper), TTS integrations (ElevenLabs, Google TTS) Languages: Python (required); FastAPI for AI service exposure Cloud: GCP or Azure for AI/ML workload deployment — Vertex AI, Azure OpenAI, Cloud Run Evaluation Frameworks: RAGAS, DeepEval, custom eval pipelines, or LLM-as-judge approaches Containerization: Docker; basic Kubernetes for deploying AI services Monitoring: AI-specific observability — LangSmith, Langfuse, or custom logging for tracing LLM calls in production Additional Information Skills & Competencies : Strong analytical thinking — able to diagnose and improve AI system behavior through systematic evaluation and iteration Ability to balance research-oriented experimentation with production-grade engineering rigor Good communication skills — able to explain AI system behavior, limitations, and tradeoffs clearly to non-technical Product and Project stakeholders Quality-first mindset — proactively defines success metrics and failure modes before building Collaborative and cross-functional — works closely with Backend, Frontend, and QA to ensure AI components integrate cleanly into the full product Agile/Scrum mindset with comfort operating in sprint-based delivery cycles Keeps up with the fast-moving AI landscape and proactively identifies relevant new tools, models, or techniques applicable to the team

title: Security Engineer
description: PT Teknologi Inovasi Labs (TILabs) is a software and analytics company based in Jakarta, focused on developing ERP systems, SaaS products, and analytics solutions powered by big data and machine learning. We are committed to technological innovation and to building solutions that are secure, scalable, and reliable to meet a wide range of business needs. Role Description : This is a full-time, on-site Security Engineer position at PT Teknologi Inovasi Labs (TILabs). The Security Engineer is responsible for executing both offensive and defensive security strategies to ensure the resilience of our ERP systems, SaaS products, and company infrastructure through controlled attack testing, vulnerability identification, and continuous strengthening of detection and protection controls. Key responsibilities include conducting penetration testing on web applications and APIs, identifying and validating vulnerabilities based on OWASP standards, classifying weaknesses using CWE, referencing relevant CVEs, configuring SIEM/XDR, performing threat hunting, and collaborating with the DevOps team to ensure mitigations are effective and continuously maintained across production environments and the SaaS platform. Qualifications : Experience in web application and API penetration testing Understanding of PTES, OWASP Top 10, CWE, and CVE Experience using Burp Suite, Nuclei, Osmedeus, or similar offensive security tools Experience with SIEM/XDR tools such as Wazuh and IDS/IPS solutions such as Suricata Strong understanding of Linux and networking fundamentals (HTTP, TLS, DNS) Ability to produce clear, well-documented Proofs of Concept (PoCs) Scripting skills in Python or Bash are preferred Experience in bug bounty, vulnerability disclosure, or capture-the-flag (CTF) is a plus Certifications such as OSCP/CEH or equivalent are a strong plus Minimum 1–2 years of experience as a Security Engineer; fresh graduates are welcome to apply Additional Requirements : Minimum 1+ year of experience in Red Team / Offensive Security Submit your recent CV/Portfolio to recruitment@tilabs.id

title: AnyLab Internship Program: AI Agents and Workflow Automation
description: ANYLAB INTERNSHIP PROGRAM ▎ What Is AnyLab? An AI Implementation Lab based in AnyMind Indonesia office. A team that builds AI agent systems to automate real business operations and deploys them into production environments. Join the founding squad of an AI implementation team and build autonomous AI agent systems that solve real business problems — working daily alongside the technical architect. ▎What Interns Will Do - Core Mission Build AI agent systems that automate business operations at scale: Design, implement, and deploy multi-agent architectures where multiple specialized AI agents collaborate through structured data protocols to autonomously complete complex tasks. Interns will work on a range of business automation projects, matched to business priorities and their own interests and strengths. These projects can include automating social media analysis, drafting business proposals and strategies, automating consumer research and insight generation, creating AI-powered marketing creatives with brand checks, building systems that aggregate and report data from multiple sources, and exploring new automation-based solutions or products ▎What Interns Will Learn 🏗  Multi-Agent System Design: Decompose complex workflows into specialized AI agents with clear responsibilities and communication protocols. 🛡  Harness Engineering: Build validation, error recovery, state management, and quality enforcement systems around AI agents — the discipline that separates production AI from demos. 🤖  AI-Directed Development: Use AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex) as your primary development tool. Think in architecture, not syntax. 🎯  Context Engineering: Design what information to feed AI agents and when — the art of minimal, precise context injection. 📊 Evaluation & Quality Systems: Build quantitative scoring rubrics, golden datasets, and automated feedback loops to measure and enforce output quality. ⚡  Hybrid Architecture Design: Know when to use AI vs. regex vs. solvers vs. rules-based logic — choose the right tool for each part of a pipeline. ▎ What Are We Looking For Currently studying in or recently graduated from a reputable university, preferably in Business, Marketing, Data/Computer Science, or a related field. Strong interest in business automation and AI agents for marketing, research, and reporting use cases. Ability to analyze data and turn findings into clear, actionable insights or simple reports. Basic technical skills for working with AI/automation tools (e.g., Python, SQL, or low-code/agentic builders like n8n/Make is a plus, not a must). Strong problem-solving skills and willingness to experiment with new tools and workflows. Clear communication skills to document processes, explain findings, and collaborate with business stakeholders.

title: Lead Data Scientist
description: About us: Populix is a consumer insights platform that helps businesses connect with its database of respondents and provides them with insights to better understand the preferences of Indonesian consumers. Populix has a pool of over 1,000,000 diverse, readily accessible, and highly qualified respondents across Indonesia. Its products range from intensive research studies to simple surveys and can be arranged on a project or subscription basis. Focusing on Indonesian consumers being super sticky to their phones, Populix facilitates a diverse range of data collection methods via its mobile app. About the Role: Populix is building the future of AI-powered market research, combining structured data, unstructured insights, and generative AI into a seamless research intelligence platform. We're looking for a Lead Data Scientist to help drive that vision forward, someone who can spearhead the development of simulation systems and automation pipelines, while actively supporting the Head of Data Science in shaping our AI research strategy. This role will be at the forefront of building simulation modeling, scaling automation for text and audio-based survey data, and translating our research into whitepapers that position Populix as a thought leader in the region. You'll also play a key role in advancing our use of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and modular AI architectures to deliver insights that are fast, accurate, and contextualized. Key Responsibilities: Lead the Design and implementation of behavioral simulation responses and demographic patterns using generative models, statistical modeling, and controlled simulations. Collaborate with the research and marketing teams to create simulation-driven whitepapers and internal studies, helping communicate the value of synthetic insight across use cases like campaign testing, segmentation, and hypothetical trends. Drive automation of research workflows that involve open-ended responses and audio data, including pipelines for transcription, classification, summarization, and sentiment analysis. Work with the Head of Data Science to translate high-level product and research strategy into technical roadmaps, experiment plans, and model architecture decisions. Help scale our AI insight engine by contributing to Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) workflows and collaborating with LLM engineers on modular pipelines for context-rich output generation. Collaborate closely with engineers, designers, and product teams to ship robust ML-powered tools into production across the Populix platform. Provide mentorship to other data scientists, sharing knowledge, reviewing modeling work, and helping maintain a culture of experimentation, reproducibility, and ethical AI. Required Qualifications: Master’s degree required, preferably in Computer Science, Statistics, Data Science, or a related quantitative field; PhD is a strong plus 5+ years of experience in data science or applied machine learning, including at least 1 year in a technical leadership role Deep experience in generative modeling (e.g., GANs, VAEs), simulation, or behavioral data modeling, with a strong grounding in statistics and hypothesis testing. Hands-on experience with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures and knowledge integration with LLMs. Solid programming skills in Python and experience with tools like LangGraph, LangSmith, scikit-learn, PyTorch, Hugging Face, or equivalent frameworks. Familiarity with both structured (e.g., survey data) and unstructured (e.g., audio, text) data workflows, including preprocessing, feature extraction, and integration into insight pipelines Experienced in creating ideas and coding them into effective AI-driven solutions to real-world problems. Strong communication skills and the ability to translate complex modeling approaches into product or research value. Posisi ini berperan dalam riset teknis, pengembangan model machine learning/deep learning, serta integrasi model ke dalam sistem produksi secara scalable dan reliable. Tanggung Jawab Utama Mengembangkan dan mengoptimalkan model Machine Learning dan Deep Learning. Melakukan eksplorasi data, preprocessing, dan feature engineering. Berkolaborasi dengan tim Data, Engineering, dan Business untuk menerjemahkan kebutuhan bisnis menjadi solusi teknis. Menyusun dokumentasi teknis dan laporan hasil pengembangan model. Kualifikasi Teknis Menguasai Python (wajib); R atau C++ menjadi nilai tambah. Menguasai TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn. Memahami algoritma ML: regresi, klasifikasi, clustering, ensemble/boosting. Memahami arsitektur deep learning: CNN, RNN, LSTM, Transformer. Berpengalaman dalam deployment (Docker, FastAPI, Flask, REST API). Familiar dengan platform cloud (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, Azure ML) menjadi nilai tambah. Kualifikasi Non-Teknis Kemampuan analitis dan problem-solving yang kuat. Mampu bekerja dalam tim lintas fungsi. Kemampuan komunikasi yang baik kepada stakeholder teknis maupun non-teknis. Pendidikan & Pengalaman Minimal S1 di bidang terkait (Ilmu Komputer, Matematika, Statistik, Teknik Informatika, dsb). Fresh graduate dengan portofolio kuat dipertimbangkan. Level menengah–senior: pengalaman 2–5 tahun dalam pengembangan AI/ML. Sertifikasi profesional menjadi nilai tambah.

title: Artificial Intelligence Engineer
description: Deskripsi Singkat Pekerjaan (Job Summary) Data Engineer bertugas untuk membangun, mengelola, dan mengoptimalkan sistem pipeline data yang scalable dan efisien. Mereka memastikan bahwa data dari berbagai sumber dapat dikumpulkan, diproses, disimpan, dan disediakan secara andal untuk digunakan oleh tim AI, data science, dan BI (business intelligence). Tugas & Tanggung Jawab (Job Description) Desain & Pengembangan Pipeline Data Membangun pipeline data dari berbagai sumber (API, database, IoT, web scraping, dll). Mengotomatisasi aliran data dari pengumpulan hingga penyimpanan. Integrasi & ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) Mendesain proses ETL/ELT untuk transformasi data mentah menjadi data siap analisis. Memastikan data tersinkronisasi antar sistem (DWH, DB, Data Lake, dll). Manajemen Infrastruktur Data Menyiapkan dan mengelola data warehouse atau data lake (BigQuery, Snowflake, Redshift, Hadoop). Memastikan pipeline berjalan lancar dengan low-latency dan fault-tolerant. Kolaborasi dengan Tim Lain Bekerja erat dengan Data Scientist, BI Analyst, dan AI Engineer untuk memahami kebutuhan data. Membantu akses data yang aman dan efisien. Monitoring & Troubleshooting Memonitor pipeline data secara real-time dan mengatasi error atau bottleneck. Menjamin kualitas dan integritas data (data validation, cleansing, deduplication). Optimasi & Dokumentasi Mengoptimalkan performa query dan penggunaan resource. Menyusun dokumentasi pipeline, skema data, dan prosedur teknis. Kualifikasi (Qualifications) 🛠 Hard Skills: Bahasa pemrograman: Python, SQL (wajib); Java/Scala (nilai tambah). Tools ETL: Apache Airflow, Luigi, dbt, Talend, Informatica. Database: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Cassandra. Big Data Platform: Spark, Hadoop, Kafka, Flink (opsional). Cloud: AWS (Glue, Redshift), GCP (BigQuery, Dataflow), Azure Data Factory. Data Modeling: Star schema, Snowflake schema, normalization/denormalization. Data Governance & Security: Roles, encryption, access control. Soft Skills: Kemampuan memecahkan masalah secara sistematis. Komunikasi efektif dengan tim teknis dan non-teknis. Disiplin terhadap dokumentasi dan standardisasi. Latar Belakang Pendidikan: S1/S2 di bidang Ilmu Komputer, Sistem Informasi, Teknik Informatika, Data Engineering , atau bidang terkait.

title: Data Engineer
description: Requirement for Middle Level: 1. Min experiences 3 years as Data Engineer ( Junior & Middle Level) 2. Experience in writing SQL query, SQL function and SQL procedure is mandatory 3. Experience in develop Microsoft Power BI Dashboard is mandatory 4. Have experience in SSRS reporting,  Google Big Query, ETL & data pipeline is advantage. 5. Have knowledge and experience in data science with Phyton is advantage. Requirement for Junior Level : 1. Programming and Scripting: Proficiency in Python, Java, or Scala for pipeline development. 2. Database Management: Expertise in SQL and Gogle Big Query 3. Data Modeling: Ability to design schema and data models optimized for analytics. 4. Big Data Tools: Knowledge of platforms like Hadoop, Spark, Kafka, or Flink for processing large datasets. Problem Solving: Analytical skills for troubleshooting pipeline issues, optimizing performance, and ensuring data integrity. Core Responsibilities 1. Data Pipeline Development and Management Data engineers create and manage the pipelines that extract data from various sources, transform it into usable formats, and load it into databases or data warehouses (ETL/ELT processes). They ensure that data flows reliably from source systems to reporting and analytics platforms. 2. Data Storage and Architecture They design and maintain scalable and secure data storage solutions, such as relational databases, NoSQL databases, and cloud-based data warehouses. They establish schemas, indexing strategies, and storage models optimized for performance and analytics. 3. Data Quality and Governance Data engineers enforce data quality standards, implement validation and cleansing processes, and monitor pipelines to detect and resolve inconsistencies. They also ensure compliance with data governance policies and standards, including privacy regulations. 4. Performance Optimization and Scalability Optimizing database queries, improving pipeline performance, and planning for scalable infrastructure to manage growing datasets are key responsibilities. This includes tuning systems to handle large-scale batch and real-time processing efficiently. 5. Collaboration with Stakeholders Data engineers work closely with data scientists, analysts, and business teams to understand their data requirements and provide reliable datasets for analysis, reporting, and machine learning applications. 6. Tooling and Automation They leverage tools such as Apache Spark, Hadoop, Kafka, Airflow, and cloud services like AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform to automate workflows and manage large-scale data processing.

Strong knowledge and hands-on experience in: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI MLOps and automated ML pipelines Proficiency in Python (required); experience with R, Javascript, or C++ is a plus. Hands-on experience with Google Cloud Platform (Vertex AI, BigQuery, Dataflow, Cloud Storage, etc.). Experience with AWS is a plus. Key Responsibilities: Design, develop, and train machine learning and deep learning models. Experiment with different model architectures to enhance performance. Integrate AI models into existing systems and applications. Deploy and maintain models in production environments. Optimize models for speed, scalability, and cost-efficiency. Research and explore new techniques for optimizing Large Language Models (LLMs). Collaborate with data engineers, software engineers, product managers, and other teams. Clearly communicate technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders. Define project requirements and deliverables with cross-functional teams. Monitor and improve model performance using feedback and new data. Document the development process, models, and algorithms. Prepare reports and presentations on project progress and outcomes. Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.

Requirements: More than 2 years of relevant experience or significant internship. Proficiency in programming languages like Python, Java, or SQL. Basic knowledge of data modeling and database management. Familiarity with ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) processes. Understanding of data warehousing concepts. Must have experience of extracting data from HTML, and web crawling.

description: Role Overview We’re looking for a curious and driven Junior AI & Data Engineer to join our growing team. This is your chance to work at the intersection of AI, data analytics, and real-world problem-solving—from improving manufacturing efficiency to forecasting business trends. You’ll collaborate with our operations, IT, and commercial teams, applying AI and prompt engineering techniques to deliver impactful solutions. Whether you’re a fresh graduate or just starting your tech career, if you’re passionate about AI and eager to learn, we want to hear from you! What You’ll Do Prepare, clean, and process data from multiple sources. Support the development and testing of AI/ML models. Design and fine-tune prompts for generative AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney) to get accurate, relevant outputs. Document workflows, code, and project deliverables for easy future reference. What We’re Looking For Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Industrial Engineering, or related field (fresh graduates welcome!). Basic skills in Python, SQL, or another programming language. Solid understanding of AI concepts & fundamentals (regression, classification, basic neural networks). Basic knowledge of prompt engineering for generative AI tools. Data analysis and visualization skills (Excel or equivalent). Excellent communication, problem-solving, and collaboration skills, with a growth mindset. Nice to Have: Experience with AI/ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn). Understanding of IoT or automation systems. Internship or academic project experience in AI, analytics, or manufacturing.

Menyusun dokumentasi teknis termasuk BRD (Business Requirement Document), FSD (Functional Specification Document), UML Diagram, ERD (Entity Relationship Diagram), Flowcharts, serta dokumentasi API  untuk memastikan struktur data dan integrasi sistem terdokumentasi dengan baik. Menyelesaikan masalah yang terkait dengan sistem informasi secara tepat waktu dan efisien. Bekerja sama dengan vendor dan pihak ketiga lainnya, seperti pengembang web dan penyedia hosting, untuk memastikan kelancaran proyek. Berkolaborasi dengan tim Quality Assurance dalam menyusun skenario pengujian, Test Plan, serta memandu proses User Acceptance Testing (UAT) untuk memastikan produk akhir sesuai dengan spesifikasi desain awal dan kebutuhan bisnis. Memberikan pelatihan dan dukungan kepada pengguna sistem, membantu mereka memahami dan menggunakan sistem dengan efektif. Tetap up-to-date dengan teknologi dan tren terbaru dalam industri pembuatan website dan aplikasi. ✅ Qualifications : Min. S1 Ilmu Komputer/Teknik Informatika/bidang terkait Pengalaman minimal 4 tahun sebagai Sistem Analis , dengan minimal 2 tahun pengalaman di industri pembuatan website dan aplikasi. Keterampilan analisis dan pemecahan masalah yang sangat baik, dengan kemampuan untuk mengidentifikasi akar penyebab masalah dan mengembangkan solusi yang efektif. Memiliki kemampuan untuk menerjemahkan bahasa bisnis yang abstrak menjadi spesifikasi teknis yang detail dan dapat dieksekusi oleh tim developer. Mahir dalam menggunakan alat pemodelan data dan dokumentasi sistem (seperti Drawio Lucidchart, atau Camunda) serta familiar dengan standar dokumentasi API modern. Keterampilan komunikasi dan interpersonal yang luar biasa, dengan kemampuan untuk berkolaborasi secara efektif dengan tim internal dan eksternal. Kemampuan untuk bekerja secara mandiri dan sebagai bagian dari tim, dengan motivasi tinggi dan inisiatif yang kuat. Pengetahuan yang kuat tentang bahasa pemrograman, seperti NextJs, NestJs, JavaScript, Python, dan lainnya. Pengalaman dengan manajemen basis data, seperti Oracle, MySQL, PostgreSQL, dan MongoDB. Pengalaman dengan alat dan metodologi DevOps adalah nilai tambah.
