Berpengalaman dalam mengumpulkan, memproses, dan menganalisis data kompleks dari berbagai sumber. Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik untuk menyampaikan wawasan data dengan jelas. Kemampuan bekerja dalam tim yang kolaboratif dan berorientasi pada tujuan. Tentang Kami PT Global Retailindo Pratama (M Mart) adalah pemain terkemuka dalam industri ritel modern di Indonesia. Dengan lebih dari 500 gerai di seluruh Indonesia, kami berkomitmen untuk menyediakan pengalaman berbelanja yang menyenangkan dan nyaman bagi pelanggan kami. Kami menghargai inovasi, kewirausahaan, dan kolaborasi dalam tim kami, serta menjunjung tinggi nilai-nilai integritas, keberagaman, dan kesejahteraan karyawan. Tugas dan Tanggung Jawab Utama Melakukan proses data cleansing secara menyeluruh (mengubah dirty data menjadi clean data) untuk memastikan validitas informasi di seluruh sistem Hikari. Mengembangkan dasbor Data Visualization yang dinamis untuk menyajikan performa operasional dan finansial secara visual kepada manajemen. Membangun skrip atau aplikasi sederhana menggunakan Python untuk mengotomatisasi tugas-tugas rutin antar departemen. Menjadi jembatan teknis dalam pengaplikasian teknologi AI di sistem Hikari, berkoordinasi langsung dengan vendor eksternal untuk memastikan integrasi berjalan mulus. Mengelola administrasi domain, hosting, dan operasional cloud (Google Workspace/Microsoft 365). Mengelola aspek teknis dan front-end website perusahaan agar tetap relevan dan fungsional. Menjamin keamanan data perusahaan melalui manajemen SSL, enkripsi dasar, dan protokol keamanan perangkat lunak. Mengelola dan memantau prosedur backup data secara otomatis dan berkala untuk menjamin pemulihan data jika terjadi kendala (disaster recovery). Syarat dan Kualifikasi Wajib lulusan S1 Computer Science (Ilmu Komputer) atau Informatika. Penguasaan mendalam bahasa pemrograman Python untuk pengolahan data. Pengalaman dalam Data Cleansing dan manajemen database relasional. Kemampuan membuat visualisasi data yang tajam (Power BI, Tableau, atau library Python). Memahami konsep Integration & AI (bagaimana menghubungkan API atau layanan pihak ketiga ke sistem internal). Paham manajemen hosting, domain, dan layanan cloud. Problem Solver yang kreatif dan proaktif. Memiliki kemampuan analisis yang kuat terhadap data. Mampu berkomunikasi secara efektif untuk menerjemahkan kebutuhan bisnis ke bahasa teknis vendor.

title: Data & AI Engineer
description: Job Description Implementing appropriate data structures to support Big Data, Analytical models and BI reporting solutions using relational and nonrelational data management technologies. Implementing Data Warehouse modelling for consolidated data from various data sources Implementing Machine Learning & Generative AI to solve business case Implementing analytical models to predict business outcomes with tools such as TensorFlow, Keras or pyTorch Minimum Qualifications Strong proficiency in Python and SQL Experience with data processing frameworks such as Pandas, NumPy, or PySpark Familiarity with machine learning frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or Scikit-learn Experience in building, deploying, and maintaining machine learning models Understanding of data modeling, data warehousing, and ETL processes Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure) is a plus Knowledge of big data technologies such as Hadoop or Spark is an advantage Strong analytical and problem-solving skills Ability to work collaboratively in a cross-functional team environment Understanding of AI concepts such as NLP, Computer Vision, or Deep Learning is a plus

title: Senior Business Analyst
description: Description FINNS Beach Club is looking for a strategic Business Analytics & Performance Optimization Lead to drive measurable improvements in revenue generation, cost efficiency, and operational excellence across our hospitality operations. This position's mission is toransform raw data into profit. Your success will be measured by the tangible business improvements you drive: revenue lifted, costs reduced, and operations streamlined. You'll own the analytics function, uncover hidden opportunities in our data, and work directly with leadership to implement changes that impact the bottom line. Summary FINNS World's Best Beach Club is not just a beach club; it's a destination where dreams come alive! We pride ourselves on creating exhilarating entertainment, vibrant energy, and unforgettable F&B experiences. Nestled along the breathtaking Bali coastline, we provide a one-of-a-kind party atmosphere that leaves our guests craving for more. Responsibilities Revenue Optimization Analyze pricing strategies, demand patterns, and customer behavior to identify revenue uplift opportunities Build dynamic pricing models and yield management frameworks to maximize RevPAG/revenue per available guest Identify underperforming revenue streams and recommend strategic interventions Quantify the impact of promotional activities, packages, and marketing initiatives Cost & Margin Management Conduct deep-dive cost analysis across labor, COGS, utilities, and overhead to identify efficiency gains Build financial models that scenario-test cost reduction initiatives before implementation Establish benchmark metrics and alert systems for margin compression Partner with procurement and operations to optimize inventory levels and reduce waste Operational Excellence Design and maintain KPI dashboards that give real-time visibility into operational health Identify bottlenecks in guest flow, service delivery, and resource allocation Model staffing optimization scenarios to balance service quality with labor efficiency Create predictive models for demand forecasting to improve planning accuracy Analytics Infrastructure & Insights Own the ERP Analytics environment: build robust reporting architecture that scales Develop SQL-based data pipelines to automate analysis and eliminate manual reporting Establish data governance standards and drive improvement in data quality across teams Translate complex analytical findings into clear, actionable recommendations with quantified business impact Strategic Partnership Present monthly performance reviews to leadership with specific recommendations and ROI projections Challenge and course-correct when operational teams are working with poor data or flawed assumptions Act as the analytical backbone for strategic initiatives. Qualifications 5+ years of progressive experience in Business Intelligence, FP&A, or Operational Analytics with demonstrated impact on business performance Hospitality industry experience required, such as Beach Clubs, Hotels, Multi-unit F&B Groups, or similar high-volume, margin-sensitive operations Proven ability to architect reporting solutions, not just run reports Can write complex queries for analysis, automation, and data quality validation Advanced SQL proficiency. Expert-level skills in scenario modeling, sensitivity analysis, and P&L forecasting Must provide specific examples of analyses that led to measurable business improvements (revenue growth, cost savings, efficiency gains) Fluent Bahasa Indonesia and Professional English are mandatory Experience with additional BI/analytics tools (Tableau, Power BI, etc ) (preferable) Experience in Python and R (preferable) Background in revenue management or yield optimization (preferable) Exposure to ERP implementation or system integration projects (preferable) Consulting or multi-site operations experience (preferable)

title: AI Automation & Systems Specialist
description: About the Role We are looking for a technically skilled AI Automation & Systems Specialist to design and implement automation across our organisation. This role focuses on building AI-driven workflows and internal systems that reduce manual work, improve efficiency, and integrate multiple platforms across our operations. You will work closely with leadership to identify automation opportunities and build scalable solutions using modern AI tools and automation platforms. This is an exciting opportunity for someone who enjoys experimenting with AI tools, building workflows, and solving operational problems with technology. Key Responsibilities • Design and build automation workflows across internal systems • Implement AI integrations to improve operational efficiency • Build automation using tools such as Make.com , Zapier, Power Automate, or n8n • Integrate APIs between internal tools, CRM systems, and third-party platforms • Build and deploy AI agents and AI-assisted workflows • Work with leadership to identify processes that can be automated • Maintain and improve existing automation infrastructure • Document automation systems and workflows Required Skills & Experience • Experience with automation platforms (Make.com, Zapier, n8n, or Power Automate) • Strong technical understanding of AI tools and AI workflows • Experience working with AI agents or LLM tools (Claude, GPT, etc.) • Comfortable working with APIs and system integrations • Basic command line / terminal experience (CLI) • Ability to troubleshoot automation workflows and technical integrations • Strong problem-solving ability and technical curiosity Highly Desirable • Experience building AI agents or multi-step AI workflows • Experience integrating AI into business processes • Familiarity with webhooks, APIs, and data pipelines • Basic scripting ability (Python, JavaScript, or similar) What We Offer • Opportunity to build AI systems across a fast-growing organisation • Work directly with leadership on automation strategy • Freedom to experiment with cutting-edge AI tools • Competitive salary based on experience How to Apply Please apply with: • Your CV • A short description of AI automations or workflows you have built • Any portfolio, GitHub, or project examples (if available)

title: Data Engineer
description: The Data Transformation Functional is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable data pipelines and transformation processes that enable reliable data flow across systems. This role bridges business needs and technical implementation by translating functional data requirements into optimized data models and ETL/ELT workflows. The engineer ensures data is properly cleansed, structured, and enriched for analytical and operational use—supporting reporting, business intelligence (BI), data science, and digital initiatives. The position requires strong skills in data modeling, SQL, and cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP), with an understanding of data governance, quality, and performance optimization. Job Description: Design, develop, and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines for data ingestion, transformation, and integration. Collaborate with business and analytics teams to define data requirements and translate them into technical solutions. Build and optimize data models to support BI tools, dashboards, and advanced analytics. Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and compliance with data governance policies. Automate data workflows and monitor pipeline performance for reliability and scalability. Work closely with data architects and functional teams to improve overall data ecosystem efficiency. Job Requirement: Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, or a related field; Master’s degree is a plus. Experience in data engineering, data transformation, or data integration roles is a plus. Fresh Grad is welcome. Proven experience designing, developing, and maintaining ETL/ELT data pipelines for structured and semi-structured data using tools such as dbt, Informatica, Talend, or Apache Airflow. Hands-on experience working with cloud-based data platforms such as Snowflake, Databricks, Google BigQuery, Amazon Redshift, or Azure Synapse. Strong proficiency in SQL and practical experience with at least one programming language (e.g., Python, Scala, or Java) for automation and data manipulation. Demonstrated experience integrating and preparing data for Business Intelligence (BI) tools, such as Power BI, Qlik Sense, or Tableau, ensuring optimized data structures for visualization and analysis. Experience collaborating closely with business analysts, functional teams, and data consumers to translate business requirements into technical data solutions. Exposure to version control systems (Git) and CI/CD workflows, ideally within an Agile development environment. Technical skills: SQL, Python, or Scala. TL/ELT tools (e.g., dbt, Informatica, Talend). Cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift). CI/CD and version control (e.g., Git, Jenkins) Soft skills: Analytical Thinking Ability to interpret complex data processes, identify root causes of issues, and propose practical solutions. Business Acumen Understands business processes and can translate functional requirements into technical data solutions that add measurable value. Communication Skills Able to communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders, including data architects, analysts, and business users. Collaboration & Teamwork Works effectively within cross-functional teams, fostering cooperation between IT, data, and business units. Problem-Solving Mindset Approaches challenges systematically, balancing technical precision with business needs. Attention to Detail Ensures data accuracy and consistency throughout transformation and integration processes. Continuous Learning Stays updated with emerging data technologies, engineering frameworks, and best practices.

title: DATA ANALYST
company: PT Asuransi Jiwa Syariah Al Amin
description: KUALIFIKASI: Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang Ilmu Komputer, Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, atau bidang terkait. Pengalaman minimal 1-2 tahun di bidang pengelolaan database atau posisi terkait (fresh graduate dengan kemampuan relevan dipersilakan melamar) Memahami konsep dasar sistem manajemen database relasional (RDBMS) dan non-relasional. Menguasai MySQL: query, stored procedure, trigger, indexing, dan optimasi performa. Menguasai PostgreSQL: DDL/DML, fungsi lanjutan, partisi tabel, dan manajemen user/role. Mampu melakukan backup dan restore database Mampu melakukan monitoring performa database menggunakan tools seperti MySQL Workbench, pgAdmin, atau monitoring tools lainnya. Memahami dan mampu menerapkan prinsip keamanan database: enkripsi, kontrol akses, dan audit log. Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim lintas divisi. Memiliki kemampuan analitis, ketelitian tinggi, dan orientasi terhadap kualitas data. Mampu berkomunikasi secara efektif, termasuk dalam pembuatan laporan dan dokumentasi teknis. DESKRIPSI PEKERJAAN: •        Mengumpulkan, mengelola, dan memelihara data perusahaan serta memastikan kualitas data melalui validasi, pembersihan, dan pengaturan agar tetap konsisten. •        Mengelola, memonitor, dan memelihara sistem database perusahaan serta melakukan backup, pemulihan, dan optimalisasi kinerja database secara berkala. •        Melindungi data dari akses yang tidak sah dengan menerapkan prosedur keamanan dan kontrol akses. •        Membuat dan memodifikasi struktur database sesuai kebutuhan perusahaan. •        Menentukan hak akses pengguna berdasarkan peran dan tanggung jawab serta menangani permintaan akses data sesuai pedoman. •        Memantau performa database dan memastikan ketersediaan data secara optimal. •        Membuat laporan berkala tentang penggunaan data dan status database untuk manajemen, serta mendukung analisis data dengan menyediakan data yang relevan dan akurat. •        Membuat dan memelihara dokumentasi konfigurasi, struktur, dan prosedur pengelolaan database serta mendokumentasikan semua perubahan.

title: Data Analytics Manager
description: Deskripsi Pekerjaan Key Responsibilities: Strategic Leadership: Define the analytics roadmap and vision to support Flip’s long-term business goals in marketing and product development. Team Management & Mentorship: Recruit, manage, and develop a high-performing team of data analysts. Foster a culture of ownership, continuous learning, and technical excellence. Cross-Functional Partnership: Act as a strategic advisor to Marketing, Product, and Engineering leadership to identify growth opportunities and define "success" metrics. Analytics Governance: Oversee the development of standardized frameworks for customer segmentation, lifetime value (LTV), and product performance. Data Strategy: Partner with Data Engineering to influence data modeling, warehousing strategy, and the enrichment of our data ecosystem to ensure scalability. Impact Measurement: Champion a rigorous experimentation culture, overseeing the design and analysis of complex A/B tests and causal impact studies. Executive Communication: Synthesize complex analytical findings into compelling narratives and actionable recommendations for senior leadership and stakeholders. Requirements: Experience: 7+ years of experience in data analytics, with at least 2+ years in a formal people management or team lead role. Technical Depth: Mastery of SQL and Python; expert-level experience with data visualization ecosystems (Looker, Tableau, or Power BI). Business Acumen: Proven track record of using data to drive measurable business outcomes in user acquisition, retention, or monetization. Methodology: Strong foundation in statistics, including A/B testing, cohort analysis, and predictive modeling. Infrastructure: Hands-on experience with cloud-based data platforms (GCP/BigQuery preferred) and an understanding of data engineering workflows. Communication: Exceptional stakeholder management skills with the ability to influence decision-making at the executive level. Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in a quantitative field (Statistics, Economics, Computer Science, etc.).

description: Main Responsibilities Execute the collection and input of learning data to support comprehensive program effectiveness analysis. Conduct routine monitoring of digital learning systems to ensure consistent operational stability. Manage data integration processes and resolve basic technical issues within the Learning Management System (LMS). Collect and organize learning performance data for processing within the Learning Analytics system. Assist in content updates and user enrollment processes for digital learning platforms and the LMS. Design and implement programs or campaigns to drive digital learning adoption and boost participation in innovation programs (SINOV). title: IT Graduate Development Program Data Engineer
description: Job Description Amartek’s IT Graduate Development Program attracts graduates from top-tier universities who are enthusiastic about professional development and aspire to work in a quickly changing and challenging IT industry. Through Amartek's Graduate Development Program, we strive to provide 1 years program that offers the opportunity to be an IT consultant with broaden critical skills and receive mentoring from senior managers and IT trainer. Collaboration, diversity, and teamwork from different backgrounds are what make us stronger and best prepared to meet our business goals. Come bring your difference! Minimum Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Data Engineering, or related fields. Basic knowledge of SQL and programming languages such as Python or Java. Familiar with database concepts and data processing. Understanding of ETL or data pipeline concepts is a plus. Exposure to tools such as Apache Airflow, Spark, or Kafka is an advantage. Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) is a plus. Strong analytical thinking, problem-solving skills, and willingness to learn.

title: AI Engineer
description: Company Description Kata.ai is an Indonesian Conversational Artificial Intelligence company with a focus on creating technology to enhance the understanding of human conversations, improving the way humans collaborate with machines. Kata.ai’s Natural Language Processing (NLP) technology powers MultiPurpose chatbots (virtual customer service / virtual friend) for major corporations in Indonesia across different kinds of industries such as Unilever (FMCG), Telkomsel (Telco), Bank BRI (Financial Services), and Alfamart (Retail). The company’s proprietary Kata Bot Platform can be leveraged to create feature-rich chatbots on top of Kata.ai’s robust and scalable AI technology platform, ensuring company of any size can easily build their own chatbot on any messaging platform. With this platform, it is now possible for the business to focus on designing engaging interaction for their customers, while Kata.ai handles all the technology aspects of the chatbots. Established in 2015, the company has become a trusted partner for major corporations such as Microsoft, Accenture, and Line. In 2020, the company received Series-B funding from TransPacific Technology Fund and MDI Venture. Job Description You will design, build, and deploy production-grade AI systems — including LLM-powered conversational agents, RAG pipelines, NLP workflows, and voice AI integrations — to deliver intelligent, reliable, and measurable AI solutions for enterprise clients across government, financial services, healthcare, and telecommunications sectors — so that Kata's clients can automate customer interactions at scale with high accuracy, low latency, and strong business impact. Qualifications Qualifications & Education : Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, Computational Linguistics, or related field Master's degree in AI/ML is a plus Relevant certifications (GCP AI/ML, DeepLearning.AI, etc.) are advantageous Technical Skills : LLM Integration: OpenAI GPT-4o, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, or open-source models (LLaMA, Mistral, Qwen) AI Frameworks: LangChain, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, or similar agent/RAG orchestration frameworks Prompt Engineering: System prompt design, few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought, structured output (JSON mode, function calling) RAG Pipelines: Document chunking, embedding strategies, retrieval optimization, reranking Vector Databases: Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, or pgvector Voice AI: LiveKit Agents SDK, STT integrations (Deepgram, Google Speech-to-Text, Whisper), TTS integrations (ElevenLabs, Google TTS) Languages: Python (required); FastAPI for AI service exposure Cloud: GCP or Azure for AI/ML workload deployment — Vertex AI, Azure OpenAI, Cloud Run Evaluation Frameworks: RAGAS, DeepEval, custom eval pipelines, or LLM-as-judge approaches Containerization: Docker; basic Kubernetes for deploying AI services Monitoring: AI-specific observability — LangSmith, Langfuse, or custom logging for tracing LLM calls in production Additional Information Skills & Competencies : Strong analytical thinking — able to diagnose and improve AI system behavior through systematic evaluation and iteration Ability to balance research-oriented experimentation with production-grade engineering rigor Good communication skills — able to explain AI system behavior, limitations, and tradeoffs clearly to non-technical Product and Project stakeholders Quality-first mindset — proactively defines success metrics and failure modes before building Collaborative and cross-functional — works closely with Backend, Frontend, and QA to ensure AI components integrate cleanly into the full product Agile/Scrum mindset with comfort operating in sprint-based delivery cycles Keeps up with the fast-moving AI landscape and proactively identifies relevant new tools, models, or techniques applicable to the team
